runHistory.label: 2024 recalculated history
runHistory.notes: Backcast using the 2026 scoring frame. Source-level coverage is limited; 2024 values preserve the original 2024-to-2025 domain movement from the recalculated 2025 anchor.

runHistory.label: 2025 recalculated baseline
runHistory.notes: Recalculated with the 2026 source and scoring rules so the 2026 update is compared using the same measuring stick. The archived March 2026 published score was 46.0 under the prior scoring series.

runHistory.label: 2026 Q2 source refresh
runHistory.notes: 2026 source refresh in the recalculated public series. Algorithmic trading is scored from BIS FX electronic execution and Coalition Greenwich internal-AI trade-execution adoption rather than broad market-automation proxies. Code-gen uses a five-input output share, value share, workflow reliance, agentic delegation, and tool reach method.
